# ananicy-rules-generator

JSON game rules for [ananicy-cpp](https://github.com/kuchejak/ananicy-cpp) / [CachyOS/ananicy-rules](https://github.com/CachyOS/ananicy-rules): SteamSpy → SQLite → Steam PICS → `generate`.

**`generate` stdout:** `## Autogenerated` · `## Overridden` · `## Not in upstream` · `## No automatic rules`. SteamSpy `#` lines on each block: `reviews`, `median2weeks`. **Not in upstream** repeats full Wine/Native JSON for appids missing from `--vendor-games` (default `.vendor/ananicy-rules/00-default/Games`) — same rule text as Autogenerated, for upstream PRs; skipped if that dir is missing.  
Config: [`generate_conf.yaml`](generate_conf.yaml) — `filters`, `overrides`, `sort`, optional `output` (`autogenerated`, `overrides`, `missing`, `noAutomaticRules` — booleans, default `true`) to hide each `##` section. `missing` is **Not in upstream** (independent of **Autogenerated**). `--config path`.

```sh
npm install
npm test                                           # vendor rule parsing (upstream appid detection)
npm run fetch-spy                                  # ~1 page/min; optional: npm run fetch-spy -- <startPage>
npm run fetch-pics
npm run generate
npm run generate -- --min-reviews 1000 --top-weekly 5000

# Direct invocation (same as npm run generate -- ...)
npx tsx src/index.ts generate --min-reviews 1000 --top-weekly 5000
```

Scripts (needs `.vendor/ananicy-rules`): `npm run compare-vendor -- [out.txt]` · `npm run diff-to-overrides -- [diff.txt] [generate_conf.yaml]`

Docker: `docker build -t ananicy-rules .` — mount `./data`, entrypoint `npx tsx src/index.ts`.
